title: Giant Inflatable Stingray Lounger for Adults - 188cm x 145cm | Beach & Pool Float | Sturdy PVC Vinyl with Grab Handles & Repair Kit Included
features: Giant Stingray Design: Enjoy a unique and fun experience with this inflatable lounger shaped like a stingray, perfect for making a splash at the pool or beach
Dimensions: Measuring 188cm x 145cm when inflated, this lounger offers ample space for adults to relax and unwind on the water
Durable PVC Vinyl: Made from sturdy PVC vinyl, ensuring long-lasting use and durability for endless water fun
Convenient Grab Handles: Features two grab handles for easy maneuvering and added stability
Includes Repair Kit: Comes with a repair kit to quickly and easily fix any minor punctures, so you can keep the fun going without interruption
Easy to Inflate: Designed with non-return valves for quick and effortless inflation and deflation, allowing you to spend more time enjoying the water
description: Elevate your pool and beach adventures with this Giant Inflatable Stingray Lounger. Designed for adults, this large eye-catching inflatable float combines comfort, style, and durability, making it the perfect accessory for your water activities. Stunning Stingray Design Shaped like a magnificent stingray, this inflatable lounger adds a playful touch to your time in the water. Its unique design is sure to turn heads and become a favourite at any pool party or beach outing. Generous Dimensions for Maximum Comfort With dimensions of 188cm x 145cm when fully inflated, this stingray lounger provides ample space for adults with a max user weight of 80kg to stretch out and relax. Whether you're floating on a calm pool or riding the gentle waves at the beach, this float offers unparalleled comfort. Durable and Reliable Construction Crafted from high-quality PVC vinyl, this inflatable float is built to last. The sturdy material ensures that the lounger can withstand regular use and the occasional bump or scrape. Enjoy peace of mind knowing that your float is both durable and reliable. Convenient Grab Handles for Stability Equipped with two grab handles, this stingray lounger offers added stability and ease of use. Whether you're climbing on, adjusting your position, or just holding on while floating, these handles provide the support you need for a safe and enjoyable experience. Quick and Easy Repairs We know accidents can happen, which is why we've included a repair kit with your lounger. Quickly and easily fix any minor punctures, ensuring that your fun in the sun is never interrupted. Effortless Inflation and Deflation Designed with non-return valves, this inflatable lounger is easy to inflate and deflate. Spend less time setting up and more time enjoying the water with quick and hassle-free inflation. Perfect for Various Water Activities Whether you're lounging by the pool or floating on the beach this stingray float is your go-to companion. Its versatile design makes it ideal for a wide range of water activities.
